data.name: SiteSettingTitleRequired
data.value: Title is required.

data.name: SiteSettingJwtAccessTokenMinutesRange
data.value: JwtAccessTokenMinutes must be between 1 and 1440 minutes.

data.name: SiteSettingJwtRefreshTokenDaysRange
data.value: JwtRefreshTokenDays must be between 1 and 3650 days.

data.name: SiteSettingJwtSigningKeyEntropy
data.value: JwtSigningKey must be a non-empty high-entropy secret.

data.name: SiteSettingJwtClockSkewSecondsRange
data.value: JwtClockSkewSeconds must be between 0 and 3600 seconds.

data.name: SiteSettingMobileQrTokenRefreshSecondsRange
data.value: MobileQrTokenRefreshSeconds must be between 1 and 3600 seconds.

data.name: SiteSettingMobileMaxOutboxItemsRange
data.value: MobileMaxOutboxItems must be between 1 and 10000.

data.name: AppBootstrapSiteSettingsMissing
data.value: Site settings are missing. This is a server misconfiguration.

data.name: AppBootstrapJwtDisabled
data.value: JWT is disabled. Mobile authentication cannot proceed.

data.name: AppBootstrapJwtAudienceMissing
data.value: JwtAudience is not configured. This is a server misconfiguration.

data.name: JwtIssuerConfigurationMissing
data.value: Configuration key 'Jwt:Issuer' is missing or empty.

data.name: JwtAudienceConfigurationMissing
data.value: Configuration key 'Jwt:Audience' is missing or empty.

data.name: JwtSigningKeyConfigurationMissing
data.value: Configuration key 'Jwt:SigningKey' is missing or empty.

data.name: JwtValidationSiteSettingsMissing
data.value: Site settings row was not found. JWT validation cannot be configured.

data.name: JwtValidationDisabled
data.value: JWT is disabled by site settings.

data.name: JwtSigningKeyMissingInSiteSettings
data.value: JwtSigningKey is missing in site settings.

data.name: StorefrontFrontOfficeBaseUrlNotConfigured
data.value: Storefront front-office base URL is not configured.

data.name: StorefrontPaymentGatewayBaseUrlNotConfigured
data.value: Storefront payment gateway base URL is not configured.

data.name: StorefrontStripeCheckoutBaseUrlNotConfigured
data.value: Storefront Stripe checkout base URL is not configured.

data.name: StorefrontPaymentProviderNotSupported
data.value: Only Stripe storefront payments are supported.

data.name: AppBootstrapQrTokenRefreshInvalid
data.value: MobileQrTokenRefreshSeconds must be a positive integer.

data.name: AppBootstrapMaxOutboxItemsInvalid
data.value: MobileMaxOutboxItems must be a positive integer.

data.name: SiteSettingBusinessManagementWebsiteUrlHttps
data.value: BusinessManagementWebsiteUrl must be an absolute HTTPS URL.

data.name: SiteSettingImpressumUrlHttps
data.value: ImpressumUrl must be an absolute HTTPS URL.

data.name: SiteSettingPrivacyPolicyUrlHttps
data.value: PrivacyPolicyUrl must be an absolute HTTPS URL.

data.name: SiteSettingBusinessTermsUrlHttps
data.value: BusinessTermsUrl must be an absolute HTTPS URL.

data.name: SiteSettingAccountDeletionUrlHttps
data.value: AccountDeletionUrl must be an absolute HTTPS URL.

data.name: SiteSettingDefaultVatRatePercentRange
data.value: DefaultVatRatePercent must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: SiteSettingInvoiceIssuerCountryCode
data.value: InvoiceIssuerCountry must be a 2-letter uppercase country code.

data.name: SiteSettingDhlApiBaseUrlHttps
data.value: DhlApiBaseUrl must be an absolute HTTPS URL.

data.name: SiteSettingDhlShipperCountryCode
data.value: DhlShipperCountry must be a 2-letter uppercase country code.

data.name: SiteSettingShipmentAttentionDelayHoursRange
data.value: ShipmentAttentionDelayHours must be between 1 and 720.

data.name: SiteSettingShipmentTrackingGraceHoursRange
data.value: ShipmentTrackingGraceHours must be between 1 and 720.

data.name: SiteSettingSoftDeleteRetentionDaysRange
data.value: SoftDeleteRetentionDays must be between 1 and 3650 days.

data.name: SiteSettingSoftDeleteCleanupBatchSizeRange
data.value: SoftDeleteCleanupBatchSize must be between 1 and 100000.

data.name: SiteSettingDefaultCultureFormat
data.value: DefaultCulture must be like 'de-DE'.

data.name: SiteSettingSupportedCulturesCsvFormat
data.value: SupportedCulturesCsv must be comma-separated cultures like 'de-DE,en-US'.

data.name: SiteSettingMeasurementSystemInvalid
data.value: MeasurementSystem must be 'Metric' or 'Imperial'.

data.name: SiteSettingPhoneVerificationPreferredChannelInvalid
data.value: Preferred phone verification channel must be Sms or WhatsApp.

data.name: JournalEntryLineDebitOrCreditRequired
data.value: Each journal line must contain either a debit or a credit amount.

data.name: JournalEntryBalancedRequired
data.value: Journal entry must be balanced.

data.name: CustomerBusinessRequiresCompanyName
data.value: Business customers should include a company name.

data.name: InteractionSingleTargetRequired
data.value: Exactly one CRM target must be selected for an interaction.

data.name: ConsentRevocationTimestampRequired
data.value: Revoked consents must include a revocation timestamp.

data.name: TranslationsRequired
data.value: Translations are required.

data.name: AtLeastOneTranslationRequired
data.value: At least one translation is required.

data.name: AtLeastOneVariantRequired
data.value: At least one variant is required.

data.name: MenuUrlMustBeSupported
data.value: Menu URLs must be rooted app paths like '/catalog' or absolute http/https URLs.

data.name: RedirectRuleFromPathMustBeAppRelative
data.value: FromPath must be app-relative and start with '/'.

data.name: EitherUserIdOrRefreshTokenRequired
data.value: Either UserId or RefreshToken must be provided.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

data.name: PasswordUppercaseRequired
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: PasswordLowercaseRequired
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

data.name: PasswordDigitRequired
data.value: Password must contain at least one digit.

data.name: WarehouseIdValidWhenProvided
data.value: WarehouseId must be a valid identifier when provided.

data.name: BusinessIdValidWhenProvided
data.value: BusinessId must be a valid identifier when provided.

data.name: CustomerIdValidWhenProvided
data.value: CustomerId must be a valid identifier when provided.

data.name: PaymentIdValidWhenProvided
data.value: PaymentId must be a valid identifier when provided.

data.name: PointsDeltaMustNotBeZero
data.value: PointsDelta must not be zero.

data.name: ReasonRequiredWhenSubtractingPoints
data.value: Reason is required when subtracting points.

data.name: ScanSessionTokenRequired
data.value: ScanSessionToken is required.

data.name: ScanSessionTokenTooLong
data.value: ScanSessionToken is too long.

data.name: PointsPositiveInteger
data.value: Points must be a positive integer.

data.name: BusinessIdRequired
data.value: Business id is required.
data.comment: Validation/business message when business id is missing.

data.name: ModeInvalid
data.value: Mode is invalid.

data.name: AtLeastOneRewardRequiredForRedemption
data.value: At least one reward must be selected for redemption.

data.name: RewardTierIdCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Reward tier id cannot be empty.

data.name: IdentifierMustNotBeEmpty
data.value: Id must not be empty.

data.name: PageMustBePositiveInteger
data.value: Page must be a positive integer.

data.name: PageSizeMustBeBetween1And200
data.value: PageSize must be between 1 and 200.

data.name: PageSizeMustBeBetween1And500
data.value: PageSize must be between 1 and 500.

data.name: DuplicateVariantLinesNotAllowed
data.value: Duplicate variant lines are not allowed.

data.name: EitherUserIdOrAnonymousIdRequired
data.value: Either UserId or AnonymousId must be provided.

data.name: VariantIdMustNotBeEmpty
data.value: VariantId must not be empty.

data.name: QuantityMustBePositiveInteger
data.value: Quantity must be a positive integer.

data.name: CartItemAddFailed
data.value: Cart item could not be added.

data.name: CartNotFoundAfterMutation
data.value: Cart not found after mutation.

data.name: CartIdAndVariantIdMustNotBeEmpty
data.value: CartId and VariantId must not be empty.

data.name: CartItemUpdateFailed
data.value: Cart item could not be updated.

data.name: CouponApplyFailed
data.value: Coupon could not be applied.

data.name: OrderNotFound
data.value: Order not found.

data.name: OrderCannotAcceptNewPaymentAttempt
data.value: Order cannot accept a new payment attempt.

data.name: PaymentIntentCreationFailed
data.value: Payment intent could not be created.

data.name: OrderPlacementFailed
data.value: Order could not be placed.

data.name: PaymentCompletionApplyFailed
data.value: Payment completion could not be applied.

data.name: PaymentCurrencyMustMatchOrderCurrency
data.value: Payment currency does not match order currency.

data.name: InvalidPaymentAmount
data.value: Invalid payment amount.

data.name: InvalidShipmentLineOrderMismatch
data.value: Invalid shipment line: order line does not belong to the order.

data.name: RefundsNotAllowedForFailedOrVoidedPayments
data.value: Refunds cannot be recorded against failed or voided payments.

data.name: RefundCurrencyMustMatchPaymentCurrency
data.value: Refund currency does not match the payment currency.

data.name: RefundAmountExceedsRemainingCapturedAmount
data.value: Refund amount exceeds the remaining captured amount.

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictOrderModified
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The order was modified by another process.

data.name: OrderTransitionNotAllowed
data.value: Transition {0} to {1} is not allowed.

data.name: OrderPaidStatusRequiresCapturedPayment
data.value: Paid status requires captured or completed payments covering the order total.

data.name: OrderPartiallyShippedStatusRequiresPartialShipment
data.value: Partially shipped status requires shipment evidence for some, but not all, order quantities.

data.name: OrderShippedStatusRequiresFullShipment
data.value: Shipped status requires shipment evidence covering every order line.

data.name: OrderDeliveredStatusRequiresFullDelivery
data.value: Delivered status requires delivered shipment evidence covering every order line.

data.name: OrderPartiallyRefundedStatusRequiresPartialRefund
data.value: Partially refunded status requires completed refund evidence for less than the order total.

data.name: OrderRefundedStatusRequiresFullRefund
data.value: Refunded status requires completed refund evidence covering the order total.

data.name: OrderCompletedStatusRequiresFullDelivery
data.value: Completed status requires delivered shipment evidence covering every order line.

data.name: OrderCompletedStatusRequiresNoOpenRefunds
data.value: Completed status is not allowed while refunds are still pending.

data.name: LoyaltyProgramAlreadyExistsForBusiness
data.value: A loyalty program already exists for this business.

data.name: LoyaltyProgramNotFound
data.value: Loyalty program not found.

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictProgramModified
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The program was modified by another process.

data.name: RewardTierNotFound
data.value: Reward tier not found.

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictRewardTierModified
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The tier was modified by another process.

data.name: InventoryVariantsMissing
data.value: One or more variants do not exist.

data.name: InsufficientReservedStockForVariant
data.value: Insufficient reserved stock for variant {0}.

data.name: InvalidStockTransferStatus
data.value: Invalid stock transfer status.

data.name: InvalidPurchaseOrderStatus
data.value: Invalid purchase order status.

data.name: VariantNotFound
data.value: Variant not found.

data.name: TaxCategoryNotFound
data.value: Tax category not found.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountNotFound
data.value: Loyalty account not found.

data.name: BusinessMismatchForLoyaltyAccount
data.value: Business mismatch for loyalty account.

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictLoyaltyAccountModified
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The loyalty account was modified by another process.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountMustBeActiveForAdjustment
data.value: The loyalty account is not active and cannot be adjusted.

data.name: LoyaltyAdjustmentWouldResultInNegativeBalance
data.value: The adjustment would result in a negative points balance.

data.name: CouponCodeMustBeUniqueAmongActivePromotions
data.value: Coupon code must be unique among active promotions.

data.name: TaxCategoryNameMustBeUnique
data.value: Tax category name must be unique.

data.name: ShippingMethodCarrierServiceMustBeUnique
data.value: Carrier/Service combination must be unique.

data.name: FromPathMustBeUnique
data.value: FromPath must be unique.

data.name: ShippingMethodSameNameCarrierServiceAlreadyExists
data.value: A shipping method with the same Name, Carrier, and Service already exists.

data.name: ShippingMethodDifferentRecordAlreadyUsesNameCarrierService
data.value: A different shipping method already uses this Name, Carrier, and Service.

data.name: RowVersionRequired
data.value: RowVersion is required.

data.name: IdRequired
data.value: Id is required.

data.name: SlugMustBeUnique
data.value: Slug must be unique.

data.name: SlugMustBeUniquePerCulture
data.value: Slug must be unique per culture.

data.name: DuplicateCulturesNotAllowed
data.value: Duplicate cultures are not allowed.

data.name: SimpleProductMustContainOneVariant
data.value: Simple product must contain one variant.

data.name: CategoryNotFound
data.value: Category not found.

data.name: ProfileNotFound
data.value: Profile not found.

data.name: PreferencesNotFound
data.value: Preferences not found.

data.name: PageNotFound
data.value: Page not found.

data.name: SiteSettingRowNotFound
data.value: SiteSetting row not found.

data.name: BillingPlanCodeMustBeUnique
data.value: Billing plan code must be unique.

data.name: BillingPlanNotFound
data.value: Billing plan not found.

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictDetected
data.value: Concurrency conflict detected.

data.name: InvoiceNotFound
data.value: Invoice not found.

data.name: InvoiceNotLinkedToOrderPaymentFlow
data.value: Invoice is not linked to an order and cannot open a storefront payment flow.

data.name: InvoiceCannotAcceptNewPaymentAttempt
data.value: Invoice cannot accept a new payment attempt.

data.name: LinkedCustomerNotFound
data.value: Linked customer not found.

data.name: LinkedPaymentNotFound
data.value: Linked payment not found.

data.name: LinkedPaymentAlreadyAssignedToAnotherInvoice
data.value: Linked payment is already assigned to another invoice.

data.name: InvoicesCannotBeMarkedAsPaidWhileLinkedPaymentIsFailedVoidedOrRefunded
data.value: Invoices cannot be marked as paid while the linked payment is failed, voided, or refunded.

data.name: PaidInvoicesMustBeRefundedBeforeCancellation
data.value: Paid invoices must be refunded before cancellation.

data.name: UnsupportedInvoiceStatusTransition
data.value: Unsupported invoice status transition.

data.name: OnlyInvoicesWithLinkedPaymentCanBeRefunded
data.value: Only invoices with a linked payment can be refunded.

data.name: OnlyCapturedOrCompletedPaymentsCanBeRefunded
data.value: Only captured or completed payments can be refunded. Void the invoice/payment if funds were not collected.

data.name: RefundCurrencyMustMatchLinkedInvoiceAndPaymentCurrency
data.value: Refund currency must match the linked invoice and payment currency.

data.name: NoRefundableAmountRemainingOnInvoice
data.value: There is no refundable amount remaining on the invoice.

data.name: RefundAmountExceedsRemainingRefundableAmountOnInvoice
data.value: Refund amount exceeds the remaining refundable amount on the invoice.

data.name: PaymentNotFound
data.value: Payment not found.

data.name: FinancialAccountNotFound
data.value: Financial account not found.

data.name: ExpenseNotFound
data.value: Expense not found.

data.name: JournalEntryNotFound
data.value: Journal entry not found.

data.name: BusinessNotFound
data.value: Business not found.

data.name: CustomerNotFound
data.value: Customer not found.

data.name: LeadNotFound
data.value: Lead not found.

data.name: OpportunityNotFound
data.value: Opportunity not found.

data.name: LeadLifecycleUnsupportedAction
data.value: Unsupported lead lifecycle action.

data.name: OpportunityLifecycleUnsupportedAction
data.value: Unsupported opportunity lifecycle action.

data.name: LinkedUserNotFound
data.value: Linked user not found.

data.name: CustomerSegmentNameAlreadyExists
data.value: A segment with the same name already exists.

data.name: CustomerSegmentNotFound
data.value: Segment not found.

data.name: CustomerAlreadyAssignedToSegment
data.value: Customer is already assigned to this segment.

data.name: CustomerSegmentMembershipNotFound
data.value: Membership not found.

data.name: AddOnGroupNotFound
data.value: Add-on group not found.

data.name: MediaAssetNotFound
data.value: Media asset not found.

data.name: MediaAssetStillReferenced
data.value: Media asset is still referenced and cannot be purged.

data.name: BrandNotFound
data.value: Brand not found.

data.name: BrandSlugMustBeUnique
data.value: Brand slug must be unique.

data.name: ProductNotFound
data.value: Product not found.

data.name: MenuNotFound
data.value: Menu not found.

data.name: PromotionNotFound
data.value: Promotion not found.

data.name: RedirectRuleNotFound
data.value: Redirect rule not found.

data.name: ShippingMethodNotFound
data.value: Shipping method not found.

data.name: InventoryReleaseFailedDueToConcurrentChangeOrInsufficientReserved
data.value: Release failed due to concurrent change or insufficient reserved quantity.

data.name: CategoryModifiedByAnotherUser
data.value: The category was modified by another user.

data.name: ProductModifiedByAnotherUserPleaseReload
data.value: The product was modified by another user. Please reload and try again.

data.name: PageModifiedByAnotherUser
data.value: The page was modified by another user.

data.name: CurrentUserIdNotAvailable
data.value: Current user id is not available.

data.name: SettingsModifiedByAnotherUser
data.value: The settings were modified by another user.

data.name: BusinessInvitationEmailAlreadyBelongsToExistingMember
data.value: This email already belongs to a member of the business. Assign or update the existing membership instead.

data.name: BusinessInvitationPendingOrExpiredAlreadyExistsForEmail
data.value: A pending or expired invitation already exists for this email. Use resend instead of creating a duplicate invitation.

data.name: InvitationNotFound
data.value: Invitation not found.

data.name: AcceptedInvitationsCannotBeResent
data.value: Accepted invitations cannot be resent.

data.name: RevokedInvitationsCannotBeResent
data.value: Revoked invitations cannot be resent. Create a new invitation instead.

data.name: AcceptedInvitationsCannotBeRevoked
data.value: Accepted invitations cannot be revoked.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: BusinessMemberUserAlreadyAssignedToSelectedBusiness
data.value: This user is already assigned to the selected business.

data.name: BusinessMemberNotFound
data.value: Business member not found.

data.name: AtLeastOneActiveOwnerMustRemainAssignedToBusiness
data.value: At least one active owner must remain assigned to the business. Open the membership details to force an override with an explicit reason.

data.name: CartNotFound
data.value: Cart not found.

data.name: CouponIsInvalidOrInactive
data.value: Coupon is invalid or inactive.

data.name: CartLineNotFound
data.value: Cart line not found.

data.name: QuantityMustBeZeroOrPositive
data.value: Quantity must be zero or positive.

data.name: CartIdRequired
data.value: CartId is required.

data.name: ShippingTotalMinorMustBeZeroOrPositive
data.value: ShippingTotalMinor must be zero or positive.

data.name: CartDoesNotBelongToCurrentUser
data.value: Cart does not belong to the current user.

data.name: CartIsEmpty
data.value: Cart is empty.

data.name: ShippingMethodRequiredForCurrentCheckout
data.value: A shipping method is required for the current checkout.

data.name: ShippingTotalDoesNotMatchAuthoritativeCheckoutIntent
data.value: Shipping total does not match the authoritative checkout intent.

data.name: ShippingTotalMustBeZeroWhenCheckoutDoesNotRequireShipping
data.value: Shipping total must be zero when checkout does not require shipping.

data.name: CartSummaryMissingRequiredLineForCheckout
data.value: Cart summary is missing a line required for checkout.

data.name: SignedInUserRequiredToUseSavedAddress
data.value: A signed-in user is required to use a saved {0} address.

data.name: SavedAddressNotFound
data.value: Saved {0} address not found.

data.name: AddressRequired
data.value: A {0} address is required.

data.name: AddressIncomplete
data.value: The {0} address is incomplete.

data.name: OrderIdRequired
data.value: OrderId is required.

data.name: OrderConfirmationContextIsInvalid
data.value: Order confirmation context is invalid.

data.name: OrderConfirmationNotFound
data.value: Order confirmation not found.

data.name: PaymentCannotBeInitiatedForCancelledOrRefundedOrder
data.value: Payment cannot be initiated for a cancelled or refunded order.

data.name: OrderIsAlreadySettled
data.value: Order is already settled.

data.name: OrderIdAndPaymentIdAreRequired
data.value: OrderId and PaymentId are required.

data.name: PaymentNotFoundForOrder
data.value: Payment not found for the order.

data.name: PaymentIsAlreadyFinalized
data.value: Payment is already finalized.

data.name: UnsupportedStorefrontPaymentOutcome
data.value: Unsupported storefront payment outcome.

data.name: CartVariantsNoLongerAvailable
data.value: One or more cart variants are no longer available.

data.name: NoShippingOptionsAvailableForCurrentCheckout
data.value: No shipping options are available for the current checkout.

data.name: SelectedShippingMethodInvalidForCurrentCheckout
data.value: Selected shipping method is not valid for the current checkout.

data.name: SignedInUserRequiredToUseSavedShippingAddress
data.value: A signed-in user is required to use a saved shipping address.

data.name: SavedShippingAddressNotFound
data.value: Saved shipping address not found.

data.name: ShippingAddressWithCountryCodeRequired
data.value: A shipping address with a country code is required.

data.name: OwningProductNotFound
data.value: Owning product not found.

data.name: NoAddOnsApplicableButSelectionsWereProvided
data.value: No add-ons are applicable to this product, but selections were provided.

data.name: SelectedAddOnValuesDoNotBelongToApplicableGroups
data.value: One or more selected add-on values do not belong to applicable groups.

data.name: AddOnGroupRequiresMinimumSelections
data.value: Add-on group '{0}' requires at least {1} selection(s).

data.name: AddOnGroupAllowsMaximumSelections
data.value: Add-on group '{0}' allows at most {1} selection(s).

data.name: AddOnGroupAllowsOnlySingleSelection
data.value: Add-on group '{0}' allows only one selection (single-choice).

data.name: DuplicateAddOnSelectionsAreNotAllowed
data.value: Duplicate add-on selections are not allowed.

data.name: NoWarehouseIsConfigured
data.value: No warehouse is configured.

data.name: InsufficientAvailableStock
data.value: Insufficient available stock.

data.name: InsufficientAvailableStockForReservation
data.value: Insufficient available stock for reservation.

data.name: SiteSettingAdminTextOverridesJsonInvalid
data.value: Admin UI text overrides JSON must be a valid object map in the form { ""de-DE"": { ""Key"": ""Value"" } }.

data.name: BusinessAdminTextOverridesJsonInvalid
data.value: Business admin text overrides must be valid JSON.
data.comment: Validation message for invalid business-level admin text override JSON.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountIdRequired
data.value: Loyalty account id is required.
data.comment: Validation/business message when loyalty account id is missing.

data.name: Unauthorized
data.value: Unauthorized.

data.name: UnauthorizedTitle
data.value: Unauthorized

data.name: ConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict.

data.name: PhoneNumberMissing
data.value: Phone number is missing.

data.name: CommunicationSettingsMissing
data.value: Communication settings are missing.

data.name: InvalidOrExpiredVerificationCode
data.value: Invalid or expired verification code.

data.name: UserNotAuthenticated
data.value: User is not authenticated.

data.name: AuthenticatedUserIdentifierNotResolved
data.value: User identifier could not be resolved from the access token.

data.name: ExplicitDeletionConfirmationRequired
data.value: Explicit deletion confirmation is required.

data.name: RowVersionRequiredForOptimisticConcurrency
data.value: RowVersion must be provided for optimistic concurrency.

data.name: LocaleRequired
data.value: Locale must be provided.

data.name: TimezoneRequired
data.value: Timezone must be provided.

data.name: CurrencyRequired
data.value: Currency must be provided.

data.name: VerificationCodeRequired
data.value: Verification code is required.

data.name: ActiveUserAccountNotFound
data.value: Active user account not found.

data.name: SystemUsersCannotRequestAccountDeletion
data.value: System users cannot request account deletion.

data.name: UserIdRequired
data.value: User id is required.

data.name: AddressIdRequired
data.value: Address id is required.

data.name: NothingToSet
data.value: Nothing to set.

data.name: AddressNotFound
data.value: Address not found.

data.name: LinkedCustomerContextNotFound
data.value: Linked CRM customer context not found.

data.name: AddressNotOwnedByUser
data.value: Address not found or not owned by user.

data.name: TwoFactorAuthenticationNotEnabled
data.value: Two-factor authentication is not enabled.

data.name: NoActiveTotpSecret
data.value: No active TOTP secret.

data.name: InvalidTotpCode
data.value: Invalid TOTP code.

data.name: InvalidTokenOrEmail
data.value: Invalid token or email.

data.name: InvalidOrExpiredToken
data.value: Invalid or expired token.

data.name: SystemUsersCannotBeLocked
data.value: System users cannot be locked.

data.name: SystemUsersCannotBeDeleted
data.value: System users cannot be deleted.

data.name: CurrentPasswordIncorrect
data.value: Current password is incorrect.

data.name: InvalidUserRolesPayload
data.value: Invalid user-roles payload.

data.name: UserNotFoundOrInactive
data.value: User not found or inactive.

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictReloadAndRetry
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Please reload and try again.

data.name: InvalidRolesSelection
data.value: One or more roles are invalid.

data.name: InvalidRolePermissionsPayload
data.value: Invalid role-permissions payload.

data.name: RoleNotFound
data.value: Role not found.

data.name: InvalidPermissionsSelection
data.value: One or more permissions are invalid.

data.name: PermissionNotFound
data.value: Permission not found.

data.name: InvalidOrExpiredConfirmationToken
data.value: Invalid or expired confirmation token.

data.name: NoPendingTotpSecret
data.value: No pending TOTP secret.

data.name: LoginSessionExpiredOrMissing
data.value: Login session expired or missing.

data.name: UserNotFoundForThisSession
data.value: User not found for this session.

data.name: CredentialNotFoundAfterVerification
data.value: Credential not found after verification.

data.name: VerificationFailed
data.value: Verification failed.

data.name: DeviceRequired
data.value: Device is required.

data.name: DeviceNotFound
data.value: Device not found.

data.name: DeviceConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The device record was changed by another process.

data.name: SystemPermissionsCannotBeDeleted
data.value: System permissions cannot be deleted.

data.name: PermissionAssignedToRolesCannotDelete
data.value: Permission is assigned to one or more roles and cannot be deleted.

data.name: SystemRolesCannotBeEdited
data.value: System roles cannot be edited.

data.name: SystemProtectedRoleCannotBeDeleted
data.value: This role is system-protected and cannot be deleted.

data.name: ExternalLinkNotFound
data.value: External link not found.

data.name: EmailAlreadyInUse
data.value: Email address is already in use.

data.name: RequestPayloadRequired
data.value: Request payload is required.

data.name: ShippingOptionsCouldNotBeCalculated
data.value: Shipping options could not be calculated.

data.name: InactiveReminderOutcomeInvalid
data.value: Outcome must be one of: Sent, Failed, Suppressed.

data.name: UserEngagementSnapshotNotFound
data.value: User engagement snapshot was not found.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The loyalty account was modified by another process.

data.name: InvalidDeleteRequest
data.value: Invalid delete request.

data.name: LoyaltyProgramConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The loyalty program was modified by another process.

data.name: LoyaltyRewardTierNotFound
data.value: Reward tier was not found.

data.name: LoyaltyRewardTierConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The reward tier was modified by another process.

data.name: BusinessLocationNotFound
data.value: Business location was not found.

data.name: ItemConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The item was modified by another process.

data.name: RatingMustBeBetweenOneAndFive
data.value: Rating must be between 1 and 5.

data.name: EmailAuditRowNotFound
data.value: Email audit row was not found.

data.name: EmailAuditRetryStatusInvalid
data.value: Only failed or still-pending email audit rows can be retried.

data.name: EmailAuditRetryBlockedRecentAttempts
data.value: Retry blocked: {0} attempts already occurred in the last 24 hours.

data.name: EmailAuditRetryCooldownActive
data.value: Retry cooldown is still active until {0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm} UTC.

data.name: EmailAuditRecipientMissing
data.value: This audit row does not have a recipient email to resolve for retry.

data.name: EmailAuditFlowRetryUnsupported
data.value: This audit flow does not support generic retry from the audit queue.

data.name: EmailAuditInvitationRequiresBusinessLink
data.value: Invitation retry requires a business-linked audit row.

data.name: EmailAuditInvitationTargetNotFound
data.value: No open or expired invitation could be resolved for this recipient.

data.name: EmailAuditActivationTargetNotFound
data.value: No active user could be resolved for this activation email.

data.name: EmailAuditPasswordResetTargetNotFound
data.value: No active user could be resolved for this password reset email.

data.name: BusinessCampaignBusinessAndCampaignRequired
data.value: BusinessId and campaign id are required.

data.name: BusinessCampaignNameAndTitleRequired
data.value: Name and title are required.

data.name: BusinessCampaignNotFound
data.value: Campaign was not found.

data.name: BusinessCampaignConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Campaign was updated by another user. Refresh and retry.

data.name: RoleKeyAlreadyExists
data.value: Role key already exists.

data.name: PermissionKeyAlreadyExists
data.value: Permission key already exists.

data.name: RegistrationSessionExpiredOrMissing
data.value: Registration session expired or missing.

data.name: DefaultRoleNotFound
data.value: Default role was not found.

data.name: BusinessAndPlanIdentifiersRequired
data.value: Business and plan identifiers are required.

data.name: SelectedBillingPlanUnavailable
data.value: Selected billing plan is not available.

data.name: AddOnGroupConcurrencyConflict
data.value: The add-on group was modified by another operation. Please reload and retry.

data.name: ProductsNotFoundOrDeleted
data.value: One or more products were not found or are deleted.

data.name: VariantsNotFoundOrDeleted
data.value: One or more variants were not found or are deleted.

data.name: BrandConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The brand has been modified by another process.

data.name: PageConcurrencyConflict
data.value: The page was modified by another user. Please reload and try again.

data.name: RoleKeyRequired
data.value: Role key is required.

data.name: TitleRequired
data.value: Title is required.

data.name: CurrentUserIdMissing
data.value: Current user id is missing.

data.name: TooManyAttemptsPleaseTryAgain
data.value: Too many attempts. Please try again.

data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid credentials.

data.name: AccountLocked
data.value: Account is locked.

data.name: EmailAddressNotConfirmed
data.value: Email address is not confirmed.

data.name: LoginRequestCancelledOrTimedOut
data.value: Request cancelled by client or timed out during login.

data.name: InvalidOrExpiredRefreshToken
data.value: Invalid or expired refresh token.

data.name: InvitationTokenRequired
data.value: Invitation token is required.

data.name: InvitationRevoked
data.value: Invitation has been revoked.

data.name: InvitationAlreadyAccepted
data.value: Invitation has already been accepted.

data.name: InvitationExpired
data.value: Invitation has expired.

data.name: InvitedBusinessUnavailable
data.value: The invited business is not available.

data.name: InvitedUserDetailsRequired
data.value: First name, last name, and password are required for a new invited user.

data.name: InvitedAccountDisabled
data.value: The invited account is disabled. Contact support.

data.name: InvitedAccountLocked
data.value: The invited account is temporarily locked. Contact support.

data.name: BusinessUserRoleNotConfigured
data.value: Business user role is not configured.

data.name: BusinessAndSubscriptionIdentifiersRequired
data.value: Business and subscription identifiers are required.

data.name: SubscriptionNotFound
data.value: Subscription not found.

data.name: SubscriptionConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Subscription was updated by another user. Refresh and try again.

data.name: DeviceIdRequired
data.value: DeviceId is required.

data.name: DeviceIdTooLong
data.value: DeviceId is too long.

data.name: PushTokenTooLong
data.value: PushToken is too long.

data.name: AppVersionTooLong
data.value: AppVersion is too long.

data.name: DeviceModelTooLong
data.value: DeviceModel is too long.

data.name: CouldNotResolveInactiveReminderCandidates
data.value: Could not resolve inactive reminder candidates.

data.name: NothingToRevoke
data.value: Nothing to revoke.

data.name: InactiveThresholdDaysGreaterThanZero
data.value: InactiveThresholdDays must be greater than zero.

data.name: CooldownHoursMustNotBeNegative
data.value: CooldownHours must not be negative.

data.name: InvalidPagingParameters
data.value: Invalid paging parameters.

data.name: PermissionKeyRequired
data.value: Permission key is required.

data.name: InvalidTimelineCursor
data.value: Invalid cursor. Both BeforeAtUtc and BeforeId must be provided together.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountNotFoundForSpecifiedBusinessAndUser
data.value: Loyalty account not found for the specified business and user.

data.name: LoyaltyDashboardNotFoundForSpecifiedBusinessAndUser
data.value: Loyalty dashboard not found for the specified business and user.

data.name: RedemptionNotFound
data.value: Redemption not found.

data.name: BusinessMismatchForRedemption
data.value: Business mismatch for redemption.

data.name: RedemptionConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The redemption was modified by another process.

data.name: RedemptionCancelledCannotConfirm
data.value: The redemption has been cancelled and cannot be confirmed.

data.name: RedemptionAlreadyConfirmed
data.value: The redemption is already confirmed.

data.name: RedemptionPendingStateRequired
data.value: The redemption is not in a pending state.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountNotFoundForRedemption
data.value: Loyalty account associated with the redemption was not found.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountInactiveForRedemption
data.value: The loyalty account is not active and cannot be used for redemption.

data.name: RedemptionInvalidPointsAmount
data.value: The redemption has an invalid points amount.

data.name: InsufficientPointsForRedemptionConfirmation
data.value: Insufficient points to confirm the redemption.

data.name: ScanSessionTokenNotFound
data.value: Scan session token not found.

data.name: ScanSessionTokenExpired
data.value: Scan session token has expired.

data.name: ScanSessionTokenAlreadyConsumed
data.value: Scan session token has already been consumed.

data.name: ScanSessionTokenBusinessMismatch
data.value: Scan session token is bound to a different business.

data.name: ScanSessionNotFoundForToken
data.value: Scan session not found for the provided token.

data.name: ScanSessionBusinessMismatch
data.value: Scan session does not belong to this business.

data.name: ScanSessionExpired
data.value: Scan session has expired.

data.name: ScanSessionPendingRequired
data.value: Scan session is not in a pending state.

data.name: ScanSessionAccrualModeRequired
data.value: Scan session is not in accrual mode.

data.name: ScanSessionRedemptionModeRequired
data.value: Scan session is not in redemption mode.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountNotFoundForScanSession
data.value: Loyalty account for scan session not found.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountNotFoundForSpecifiedBusiness
data.value: Loyalty account not found for the specified business.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountInactive
data.value: Loyalty account is not active.

data.name: InsufficientPointsForSelectedRewards
data.value: Insufficient points for selected rewards.

data.name: SelectedRewardsMissing
data.value: Scan session does not contain any selected rewards.

data.name: SelectedRewardsInvalid
data.value: Selected rewards are invalid for this scan session.

data.name: SelectedRewardsNoPointsRequired
data.value: Selected rewards do not require any points.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: Operation failed.

data.name: BootstrapRequestFailed
data.value: Bootstrap request failed.

data.name: BootstrapPayloadEmpty
data.value: Bootstrap payload is empty. This is a server bug.

data.name: BusinessRequired
data.value: Business is required.

data.name: BusinessNameRequired
data.value: Business name is required.

data.name: BusinessCategoryKindInvalid
data.value: Business category is invalid. It must match a known category value.

data.name: BusinessMinRatingFiniteRange
data.value: MinRating must be a finite number between 0 and 5.

data.name: BusinessMinRatingRange
data.value: MinRating must be between 0 and 5.

data.name: BusinessNearRequiredWhenRadiusProvided
data.value: Near must be provided when RadiusMeters is provided.

data.name: BusinessRadiusMetersPositive
data.value: RadiusMeters must be zero or a positive integer.

data.name: BusinessOnboardingPayloadInvalid
data.value: Invalid business onboarding payload.

data.name: BusinessOwnerMembershipCreateFailed
data.value: Business owner membership could not be created.

data.name: MapBoundsRequired
data.value: Map bounds are required.

data.name: BusinessMembershipInactiveAccess
data.value: Business membership is no longer active for this user.

data.name: BusinessUserInactiveAccess
data.value: User access is currently inactive.

data.name: BusinessEmailConfirmationRequiredAccess
data.value: User email confirmation is still required.

data.name: BusinessUserLockedAccess
data.value: User access is currently locked.

data.name: BusinessPendingApprovalAccess
data.value: Business approval is still pending.

data.name: BusinessSuspendedAccess
data.value: Business access is currently suspended.

data.name: BusinessInactiveAccess
data.value: Business access is currently inactive.

data.name: BusinessSetupIncompleteAccess
data.value: Business setup is still incomplete.

data.name: UserRequired
data.value: User is required.

data.name: RewardTypeInvalidAllowedValues
data.value: RewardType is invalid. Allowed values: FreeItem, PercentDiscount, AmountDiscount.

data.name: LoyaltyRewardTierCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create loyalty reward tier.

data.name: LoyaltyRewardTierUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update loyalty reward tier.

data.name: RequestBodyRouteIdMismatch
data.value: Request payload is required and route id must match body id.

data.name: BusinessSubscriptionStatusRetrievalFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve business subscription status.

data.name: SubscriptionCancellationUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update subscription cancellation preference.

data.name: CheckoutIntentCreationFailed
data.value: Unable to create checkout intent.

data.name: BillingCheckoutEndpointNotConfigured
data.value: Billing checkout endpoint is not configured.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountAlreadyExistsForMemberInBusiness
data.value: A loyalty account already exists for this member in the selected business.

data.name: StripeWebhookSignatureHeaderRequired
data.value: Stripe-Signature header is required.

data.name: StripeWebhookSecretNotConfigured
data.value: Stripe webhook secret is not configured.

data.name: StripeWebhookSignatureInvalid
data.value: Stripe webhook signature is invalid.

data.name: StripeWebhookPayloadInvalid
data.value: Stripe webhook payload is invalid.

data.name: StripeWebhookEventIdRequired
data.value: Stripe webhook event id is required.

data.name: StripeWebhookEventTypeRequired
data.value: Stripe webhook event type is required.

data.name: StripeWebhookProcessingFailed
data.value: Stripe webhook processing failed.

data.name: WebhookDeliveryNotFound
data.value: Webhook delivery not found.

data.name: WebhookDeliveryUnsupportedAction
data.value: Unsupported webhook delivery action.

data.name: CarrierEventOccurredAtUtcRequired
data.value: Carrier event occurredAtUtc is required.

data.name: DhlWebhookAuthenticationNotConfigured
data.value: DHL webhook authentication is not configured.

data.name: DhlWebhookPayloadInvalid
data.value: DHL webhook payload is invalid.

data.name: DhlWebhookApiKeyInvalid
data.value: DHL webhook API key is invalid.

data.name: DhlWebhookSignatureInvalid
data.value: DHL webhook signature is invalid.

data.name: ShipmentNotFoundForCarrierCallback
data.value: Shipment was not found for the carrier callback.

data.name: DhlLabelGenerationNotEnabled
data.value: DHL label generation is not enabled.

data.name: DhlLabelGenerationNotConfigured
data.value: DHL label generation is not fully configured.

data.name: ShipmentNotFoundForLabelGeneration
data.value: Shipment was not found for label generation.

data.name: ShipmentCarrierMustBeDhlForLabelGeneration
data.value: Only DHL shipments can generate carrier labels in the current phase.

data.name: CommunicationDispatchOperationNotFound
data.value: Communication dispatch operation was not found.

data.name: CampaignDeliveryNotFound
data.value: Campaign delivery was not found.

data.name: ProviderCallbackInboxMessageNotFound
data.value: Provider callback inbox message was not found.

data.name: ProviderCallbackInboxUnsupportedAction
data.value: Provider callback inbox action is not supported.

data.name: ShipmentProviderOperationNotFound
data.value: Shipment provider operation was not found.

data.name: ShipmentProviderOperationUnsupportedAction
data.value: Shipment provider operation action is not supported.

data.name: ShipmentNotFoundForCarrierResolution
data.value: Shipment was not found for carrier exception resolution.

data.name: ShipmentCarrierExceptionResolutionNoteRequired
data.value: A resolution note is required to close a carrier exception.

data.name: BusinessOnboardingProvisioningBlocked
data.value: Business onboarding cannot be finalized yet. Missing: {0}.

data.name: BusinessOnboardingMissingOwner
data.value: active owner

data.name: BusinessOnboardingMissingPrimaryLocation
data.value: primary location

data.name: BusinessOnboardingMissingLegalName
data.value: legal name

data.name: PaymentDisputeReviewUnsupportedAction
data.value: The requested payment dispute review action is not supported.

data.name: StockTransferNotFound
data.value: Stock transfer not found.

data.name: PurchaseOrderNotFound
data.value: Purchase order not found.

data.name: StockTransferLifecycleUnsupportedAction
data.value: The requested stock transfer action is not supported for the current status.

data.name: StockTransferLifecycleInsufficientSourceStock
data.value: The source warehouse does not have enough available stock to dispatch this transfer.

data.name: StockTransferLifecycleInsufficientInTransitStock
data.value: The source warehouse does not have enough in-transit stock to complete or cancel this transfer.

data.name: PurchaseOrderLifecycleUnsupportedAction
data.value: The requested purchase order action is not supported for the current status.

data.name: LoyaltyScanSessionRequired
data.value: Scan session and business are required.

data.name: LoyaltyScanSessionNotFound
data.value: Scan session was not found.

data.name: LoyaltyScanSessionConcurrencyConflict
data.value: The scan session was modified by another operation. Please reload and retry.

data.name: LoyaltyScanSessionCannotExpire
data.value: Only pending scan sessions past their expiry time can be expired.
